<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rss version="2.0">
  <channel>
    <title>Manoj's Daily Essay Picks</title>
    <link>https://example.com/manoj-daily-essay-picks/</link>

    <item>
      <title>What Makes Humans Stupid</title>
      <link>https://nautil.us/what-makes-humans-stupid-1282459</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://nautil.us/what-makes-humans-stupid-1282459</guid>
      <pubDate>Wed, 08 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Stupidity is not simply the absence of intelligence; consequential stupidity often requires intelligence organized badly.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>The End of Reading Is Here</title>
      <link>https://www.theatlantic.com/magazine/2026/08/reading-crisis-postliterate-age/687618/?utm_source=apple_news</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.theatlantic.com/magazine/2026/08/reading-crisis-postliterate-age/687618/?utm_source=apple_news</guid>
      <pubDate>Wed, 08 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[People still decode words, but the habits needed for sustained reading, synthesis, and independent thought are weakening.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Researchers Reveal the Power of ‘Quantum Proofs’</title>
      <link>https://www.quantamagazine.org/researchers-reveal-the-power-of-quantum-proofs-20260706/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.quantamagazine.org/researchers-reveal-the-power-of-quantum-proofs-20260706/</guid>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Some computational problems may require proofs that are themselves quantum states, not ordinary classical documents.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>America At 250 & Beyond</title>
      <link>https://www.noemamag.com/america-at-250</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.noemamag.com/america-at-250</guid>
      <pubDate>Wed, 01 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[America’s next democratic evolution should combine citizen participation with deliberative institutions that resist populism and capture.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>The Pulse: a new trend, smart model routing</title>
      <link>https://blog.pragmaticengineer.com/the-pulse-a-new-trend-smart-model-routing/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://blog.pragmaticengineer.com/the-pulse-a-new-trend-smart-model-routing/</guid>
      <pubDate>Thu, 02 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Teams are routing each AI task to the cheapest model that can do it well enough instead of always using the strongest model.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>

items.title: What Makes Humans Stupid
items.description: Stupidity is not simply the absence of intelligence; consequential stupidity often requires intelligence organized badly.

items.title: The End of Reading Is Here
items.description: People still decode words, but the habits needed for sustained reading, synthesis, and independent thought are weakening.

items.title: Researchers Reveal the Power of ‘Quantum Proofs’
items.description: Some computational problems may require proofs that are themselves quantum states, not ordinary classical documents.

items.title: America At 250 & Beyond
items.description: America’s next democratic evolution should combine citizen participation with deliberative institutions that resist populism and capture.

items.title: The Pulse: a new trend, smart model routing
items.description: Teams are routing each AI task to the cheapest model that can do it well enough instead of always using the strongest model.
